findings.body: buildGateTrustSignal currently sets freshness_state from fileExists only, so stale is never emitted; pass computed stale/current/missing state from the same logic that drives readStaleEvidence/source_drift_status/review_subject_hash_status into evidence_trust_signals.
findings.disposition: Repaired locally by allowing computed current/stale/missing freshness state plus explicit staleness reason in buildGateTrustSignal; cockpit trust signals now mark stale review evidence from source_drift_status and review_subject_hash_status. Focused regression coverage was added in test/evidence-freshness-slos.test.mjs. CodeRabbit refresh is required before Local Qwen.

findings.body: The artifact-type prerequisite error message mentions freshness budget, source identity, freshness state, and staleness behavior even though this branch only checks source_artifacts and owner or authority_role.
findings.disposition: Repaired locally by narrowing the prerequisite error to source artifact plus owner or authority role. Focused regression coverage updates the expected error text. CodeRabbit refresh is required before Local Qwen.

findings.body: The evidence-freshness SLO template lists work_item, policy, artifact_types, trust_signal_requirements, derived_projection_rules, and source_artifacts as flat sibling keys instead of using indentation for the intended hierarchy.
findings.disposition: Repaired locally by indenting the template hierarchy and allowing required template fields under indented YAML-like structure. Focused regression coverage accepts the indented template hierarchy. CodeRabbit refresh is required before Local Qwen.

findings.body: requireNonEmptyString validates the trimmed length but returns the original string, preserving leading or trailing whitespace in validated ids.
findings.disposition: Repaired locally by returning the trimmed string after validation. Focused regression coverage verifies normalized artifact type ids. CodeRabbit refresh is required before Local Qwen.

findings.body: The repeated evidence_slo assignment in gate trust signals can be replaced with a small wrapper helper around buildGateTrustSignal.
findings.disposition: Repaired locally by adding withEvidenceSlo as the cockpit gate trust-signal wrapper. Existing cockpit and evidence-freshness tests cover unchanged output shape. CodeRabbit refresh is required before Local Qwen.

attempts.summary: CodeRabbit completed the focused BANDIT-056 Stage 3 delta review and returned two trivial open findings against focused session-context pathExists sequencing and review_subject_hash source_identity metadata.
Codex PM locally repaired both prior CodeRabbit findings. Provider evidence was intentionally stale until focused CodeRabbit refresh on the repaired source.

Focused CodeRabbit refresh completed on the repaired source and returned five open findings: one major stale-freshness trust-signal issue, three minor validation/template normalization issues, and one trivial cockpit-status helper extraction issue.

Codex PM locally repaired all five focused CodeRabbit findings with regression coverage and adjacent projection verification. Provider evidence is intentionally stale until focused CodeRabbit refresh runs on the repaired source.
